summary: Lead recommends M5_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS after evaluating all M5 evidence tasks, the explicit product-owner manual node battle decision, local validation commands, and known limitations. All M5 implementation/evidence dependencies are CLOSED; M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 remains in REVIEW pending independent systems_architect and qa_reviewer acceptance. This gate does not implement product code, does not start M6, and does not authorize manual node battle.

tests_run.result: Lockfile is up to date; supply-chain policy check passed for 396 entries.
Prettier, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed; boundary self-test produced 15 expected violations.
Architecture check and sim determinism passed; root Vitest 35 files / 249 tests passed; Web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests passed. M5 hash and loaded hash both bf042e42.
M1, M2, and M3 fixture manifests validated: 4a438525, 9ab72b0b, 76b75849.
Vite production build passed with existing large chunk warnings.
Storybook build passed with existing large chunk warnings and cleaned output.
Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only monsoonDesktop; IPC remains runtime/fullscreen only.
Desktop package smoke output created under .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64.
Playwright Chromium 8/8 passed, including M5 playable flow and required desktop viewport overflow checks.
3650 days; throughput 14716 days/sec; p50 57600 ns; p95 105100 ns; p99 176700 ns; save 1771500 ns; load 2576600 ns.
All M5 evidence tasks are CLOSED; M5 Exit was IN_PROGRESS before this REVIEW handoff.
No dependency-ready task while M5 Exit is active.
No whitespace errors before writing the gate document.

decisions: Carry forward bounded limits: minimal internal player research, desktop import/export not implemented, no-action-heavy AI evidence, duplicate React key warnings, existing large chunk warnings, and inherited M4 process limit.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and outside M5 and the 1.0 mainline.
Do not advance to M6 until independent reviewers ACCEPT, PR CI passes, the gate enters main, and M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 is closed.
risks: Reviewer may request stronger evidence or classify any accepted limitation as BLOCKED; in that case M5 must not pass.
M6 task graph must not be created until the M5 gate result is integrated and closed on main.
requested_action: Review docs/GATE-M5.md and supporting artifacts. ACCEPT only if PASS_WITH_LIMITS is justified, all M5 dependencies are closed, local validation evidence is sufficient, no unresolved Human Gate remains, and no forbidden product/runtime scope changed. Otherwise REQUEST_CHANGES with exact file and evidence references.
